structured_payload_candidate.title: Supply Fan Start/Stop
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Dual-Fan Dual-Duct Heating VAV AHU supply fan
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fan shall run when system is in Warmup Mode and Setback Mode, and during Occupied Mode while there are any heating-fan requests with a minimum runtime of 15 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: System in Warmup Mode, Setback Mode, or Occupied Mode with heating-fan requests.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Fan shall run when system is in the Warmup Mode  and Setback Mode , and during Occupied Mode  while there are any heating -fan requests with a minimum runtime of 15 minutes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Totalize VAV Box Airflow
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Totalize current airflow rate from VAV boxes to a software point for display, diagnostics, and filter alarm.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Always active when system is operating.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Sum VAV box airflow rates to obtain overall supply air rate.

evidence_quote: Totalize current airflow rate from VAV boxes to a software point.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Static Pressure Control
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Supply fan speed is controlled to maintain duct static pressure at setpoint when fan is proven ON. For small Zone Groups, provide multiple sets of gains based on load indicator.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Modulate fan speed to maintain DSP at setpoint.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Supply fan speed is controlled to maintain DSP at setpoint  when the fan is proven ON.

evidence_quote: Supply fan speed is controlled to maintain DSP at setpoint  when the fan is proven ON.
evidence_text: Supply fan speed is controlled to maintain DSP at setpoint  when the fan is proven ON.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Supply Air Temperature Control Enable
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: Heating supply air temperature control loop
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Control loop is enabled when supply air fan is proven ON, and disabled and output set to zero otherwise.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Enable loop; disable and zero output when fan not proven ON.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Fan Maintenance Interval Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Level 4 alarm when fan has operated for more than 1500 hours. Reset interval counter when alarm is acknowledged.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Fan Status Mismatch Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fan alarm indicated by status different from command for 15 seconds. Commanded ON, status OFF: Level 2. Commanded OFF, status ON: Level 4.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Commanded ON, status OFF; Commanded OFF, status ON.

structured_payload_candidate.title: Filter Pressure Drop Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Level 4 alarm when filter pressure drop exceeds the larger of the alarm limit or 12.5 Pa (0.05”) for 10 minutes when airflow exceeds 20% of design. Alarm limit varies with airflow: DPx = DP100 * (x)^1.4.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Filter DP > max(alarm limit, 12.5 Pa) for 10 min and airflow > 20% design.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Filter pressure drop exceeds the larger of the alarm limit  or 12.5 Pa (0.05”) for 10 minutes when airflow (expressed as a percentage of design airflow or design  speed if total airflow is not known) exceeds 20% : Level 4.  The alarm limit shall vary with total airflow (if available; use fan speed if total airflow is not known) as follows: 𝐷𝑃𝑥=𝐷𝑃100(𝑥)1.4

evidence_quote: Filter pressure drop exceeds the larger of the alarm limit  or 12.5 Pa (0.05”) for 10 minutes when airflow (expressed as a percentage of design airflow or design  speed if total airflow is not known) exceeds 20% : Level 4. structured_payload_candidate.title: Required AFDD Input Points
structured_payload_candidate.summary: The following points must be available: SAT, RAT, DSP, SATSP, DSPSP, HC (0-100%), FS (0-100%).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: The following points must be availabl e to the AFDD routines for each AHU: a. SAT = supply air temperature b. RAT = return air temperature c. DSP = duct static pressure d. SATSP = supply air temperature setpoint e. DSPSP = duct static pressure setpoint f. HC = heating coil valve position command; 0%  HC  100% g. FS = fan speed command; 0%  FS  100%

structured_payload_candidate.title: AFDD Rolling Averages Calculation
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Five-minute rolling averages with 1-minute sampling time shall be continuously calculated for SAT, RAT, and DSP. Operator can adjust averaging window and sampling period.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Five-minute rolling avera ges with 1 -minute sampling time of the following point values; operator shall have the ability to adjust the averaging window and sampling period for each point independently 1. SAT avg = rolling average of supply air temperature 2. RAT avg = rolling average of re turn air temperature 3. DSP avg = rolling average of duct static pressure

structured_payload_candidate.title: FC#1: Duct Static Pressure Too Low with Fan at Full Speed
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fault condition when DSP < DSPSP - ƐDSP and VFDSPD ≥ 99% - ƐVFDSPD. Possible causes: VFD problem, mechanical fan problem, fan undersized, SAT setpoint too high.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: DSP < DSPSP - ƐDSP and VFDSPD ≥ 99% - ƐVFDSPD.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: DSP < DSPSP - ƐDSP and VFDSPD ≥ 99% - ƐVFDSPD
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: FC#1  Equation  DSP < DSPSP - ƐDSP and VFDSPD ≥ 99% - ƐVFDSPD Description  Duct static pressure is too low with fan at full speed Possible Diagnosis  Problem with VFD Mechanical problem with fan Fan undersized SAT Setpoint too high (too much zone demand)

evidence_quote: FC#1  Equation  DSP < DSPSP - ƐDSP and VFDSPD ≥ 99% - ƐVFDSPD Description  Duct static pressure is too low with fan at full speed Possible Diagnosis  Problem with VFD Mechanical problem with fan Fan undersized SAT Setpoint too high (too much zone demand)

structured_payload_candidate.title: FC#2: SAT Too Low in Full Heating
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fault condition when SAT AVG < SATSP - ƐSAT and HC ≥ 99%. Possible causes: SAT sensor error, heating coil valve stuck closed, fouled/undersized coil, HW temperature too low, gas/electric heat unavailable.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: SAT AVG < SATSP - ƐSAT and HC ≥ 99%.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: SAT AVG < SATSP - ƐSAT and HC ≥ 99%
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: FC#2 Equation  SAT AVG < SATSP - ƐSAT and HC ≥ 99% Description  SAT too low in full heating Possible Diagnosis  SAT sensor error Heating coil valve stuck closed or actuator failure Fouled or undersized heating coil HW temperature too low or HW unavailable Gas or electric heat unavailable

structured_payload_candidate.title: AFDD Fault Evaluation Suspension Conditions
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Evaluation of fault conditions shall be suspended when AHU is not operating, or for ModeDelay minutes after a change in mode of any Zone Group served by the AHU.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: AHU not operating or mode change.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Evaluation of fault conditions shall be suspended under the following conditions: a. When AHU is not operating b. For a period of ModeDelay minutes following a change in mode (e.g., from Warmup Mode to Occupied Mode ) of any Zone Group  served by the AHU

structured_payload_candidate.title: AFDD Fault Condition Persistence Requirement
structured_payload_candidate.summary: A fault condition that evaluates as TRUE must do so continuously for AlarmDelay minutes before it is reported to the operator.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: A fault condition that evaluates as TRUE  must do so continuously for AlarmDelay minutes before it is reported to the operator.

evidence_quote: A fault condition that evaluates as TRUE  must do so continuously for AlarmDelay minutes before it is reported to the operator.
evidence_text: A fault condition that evaluates as TRUE  must do so continuously for AlarmDelay minutes before it is reported to the operator.

structured_payload_candidate.title: AFDD Test Mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Test mode shall temporarily set ModeDelay and AlarmDelay to 0 minutes for a period of TestModeDelay minutes to allow instant testing of the AFDD system.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set ModeDelay and AlarmDelay to 0 for TestModeDelay minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: Test mode shall temporarily set ModeDelay and AlarmDelay to 0 minutes for a period of TestModeDelay minutes to allow instant testing of the AFDD system and ensure normal fault detection occurs after testing is complete.

evidence_quote: Test mode shall temporarily set ModeDelay and AlarmDelay to 0 minutes for a period of TestModeDelay minutes to allow instant testing of the AFDD system and ensure normal fault detection occurs after testing is complete.

structured_payload_candidate.summary: When a fault condition is reported to the operator, it shall be a Level 3 alarm and shall include the description of the fault and the list of possible diagnoses from Table 5.17.4.5.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Generate Level 3 alarm with description and possible diagnoses.
